name: The Thricefold Discord
inspire: After a friendly fighter's Attack roll or Save roll that contains no successes, or after a friendly fighter is slain, Inspire another friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Irresistible Feast
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Discard 1 temptation dice, then inflict 1 damage on an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Sublime Senses
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Discard 1 temptation dice, then give a friendly fighter a Guard token. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Pavane of Slaanesh
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Discard 1 temptation dice, then pick a friendly fighter. Save rolls for that fighter cannot be affected by Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Temptations of Slaanesh
abilities.flavorText: Like all the Dark Prince's daemons, the Thricefold Discord delight in picking apart mortal morality.
abilities.rulesText:
At the start of the first Action step in each battle round, you gain a pool of 6 temptation dice.

At the end of the battle round, any temptation dice that have not been offered are lost.

{icon:reaction} Tempt…: Once per turn, immediately after your opponent rolls an unsuccessful dice in an Attack roll, you can offer them a temptation dice.

Accept: If your opponent accepts your offer, they must replace 1 unsuccessful result in their attack roll with a successful result ({icon:fury} or {icon:crit} only). Attack dice replaced in this way cannot be re-rolled or modified. Then, immediately after that Attack has been resolved, inflict 1 damage on the attacker.

Reject: If your opponent rejects your offer, immediately after that attack has been resolved, you can pick a friendly fighter that was not the target and push that fighter 1 hex.
